author: audit-agent

patch.value: Tested: pm templates save --name 'audit-task' fails. The command likely uses positional args. Discovery needed: check pm templates --help and verify correct syntax, then update docs if needed.
Templates command: document correct invocation syntax (positional vs --name)

pm templates save --name fails with 'Unknown option --name'. The templates subcommands use positional arguments not flags. The AGENTS.md and help text should clarify the correct syntax: pm templates save <name> [options].
Templates save syntax is clear in help and AGENTS.md

message: Audit finding: templates save syntax unclear
